storyboard.content: My right knee suddenly gave out while I was playing basketball and I heard a loud pop
My knee is very swollen and has started to bruise
My knee feels unstable and wobbly when I try to walk on it
I can't fully straighten or bend my knee at all
This happened yesterday during a basketball game, so it has been about 24 hours
The pain is severe, about an 8 out of 10, and I cannot put any weight on my leg at all
I am a 28-year-old man and I play recreational basketball regularly
